properties.name: Meeting Participant
properties.description: The human user who interacts with the system UI: uploads the meeting video file and downloads the resulting verbatim transcript and meeting protocol

properties.assumption_note: Dedicated ASR+diarization engine required for speaker-attributed timestamped transcripts. Cloud API or self-hosted. Stack TBD.
properties.name: ASR / Diarization Engine
properties.description: External ASR and speaker diarization service. Receives audio, returns speaker-attributed transcript segments with timestamps. Vendor/model TBD.

properties.assumption_note: LLM is the natural tool to transform raw transcript into structured protocol. Provider TBD.
properties.name: LLM Protocol Generator
properties.description: LLM service that converts the verbatim transcript into a structured meeting protocol (participants, topics, decisions, action items). Provider/model TBD.

properties.assumption_note: Large file sizes imply dedicated storage layer for durability across async steps. S3/local FS/similar. Stack TBD.
properties.name: File / Object Storage
properties.description: Object storage that holds uploaded video files during async processing. Required because 300-500 MB files cannot be held in memory through the pipeline.
